title: aster amellus subsp. scepusiensis
intro: Aster amellus subsp. scepusiensis, also known as the Scepusius Mayweed or Macedonian Mayweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Aster amellus subsp. scepusiensis include relief from digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate anxiety. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat various health issues.
